title: Gauhati University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Gauhati University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Gauhati University Result 2026 has been released for M.Sc and M.A PG semester exams. Students can check and download their results from the official examination portal at gauhati.ac.in.

content.text: Gauhati University has officially released the postgraduate semester results for M.Sc Mathematics Semester III Re-evaluation, M.A Women's Studies Semester I Supplementary, and M.Sc Biotechnology Semester I Supplementary examinations conducted in November-December 2025 for the academic session 2025-2026. The results have been declared for various postgraduate courses including M.Sc and M.A programs on the official result notification portal. Gauhati University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - gauhati.ac.in.

Students can check and download their results by visiting the official result notification page at web.gauhati.ac.in/result-notifications and clicking on the respective result link in PDF format available on Google Drive. The university has made the provisional result copies available for download, which students can save for future reference and academic purposes. Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their result including name, roll number, subject-wise marks, and overall status. In case of any discrepancies or errors in the result, students should immediately contact the Controller of Examinations of Gauhati University for clarification and correction within the specified timeframe.

Gauhati University has published the latest M.Sc and M.A postgraduate semester results on its official website for the 2026 academic session, and students can download their provisional results for reference. The results cover re-evaluation and supplementary examinations conducted in November-December 2025 for M.Sc Mathematics Semester III, M.A Women's Studies Semester I, and M.Sc Biotechnology Semester I programmes. Students who appeared for these examinations can access their marks and overall status through the official result portal at web.gauhati.ac.in/result-notifications.

rows: M.Sc Mathematics, M.A Women's Studies, M.Sc Biotechnology
Online PDF format via Google Drive links

content.text: Gauhati University has activated the direct links to check Gauhati University Result 2026 for M.Sc and M.A postgraduate semester examinations on its official result portal. Students who appeared for M.Sc Mathematics Semester III Re-evaluation, M.A Women's Studies Semester I Supplementary, and M.Sc Biotechnology Semester I Supplementary examinations can instantly view or download their semester results through the direct links provided below. These direct links help candidates quickly access their marks and result status without navigating multiple pages on the university website.

links.label: Examination 2025 Re-evaluation (Semester III, M.Sc. Mathematics) - Nov-Dec 2025
Examination 2025 Supplementary (Semester I, M.A. Women's Studies) - Nov-Dec 2025
Examination 2025 Supplementary (Semester I, M.Sc Biotechnology) - Nov-Dec 2025

sections.heading: Steps to Check Gauhati University Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow these simple steps to check and download their Gauhati University Result 2026 from the official website:

items: Visit the official website of Gauhati University at gauhati.ac.in
Navigate to the 'Results' or 'Examination' section on the homepage
Click on the result notification link or directly visit web.gauhati.ac.in/result-notifications
Look for your respective result in the list - M.Sc Mathematics Semester III Re-evaluation, M.A Women's Studies Semester I Supplementary, or M.Sc Biotechnology Semester I Supplementary
Click on the result link dated 28th April 2026 for your course and semester
The result will open as a PDF file via Google Drive link
Wait for the PDF to load completely in your browser
Look for your roll number in the result PDF
Check your subject-wise marks and overall status carefully
Verify all the details including name, roll number, subject codes, and marks obtained
Download the PDF result copy by clicking on the download icon
Save the provisional result copy for future reference and academic purposes
Take a printout of the result for your academic records
If any discrepancy is found, contact the Controller of Examinations immediately
